===''Pokémon Horizons: The Series''=== Rika first appeared in ''[[HZ046|Welcome to Naranja Academy!]]'', where she was introduced by [[Nemona]] to [[Liko]], [[Roy]], and [[Dot]]. During the brief meeting, Rika commented that she expected great things from Liko as [[Indigo Academy]]'s representative. Later, she watched Liko's battle against [[Ann]] and noticed great potential in her. In ''[[HZ055|Showdown! The Paldea Elite Four]]'', Rika was battling students of [[Naranja Academy]] as part of the [[Elite Four Tag Battle]]. Using her {{p|Clodsire}} and {{p|Dugtrio}}, she was able to defeat [[Tulip]] and [[Sidian]] by defeating the latter's {{p|Garganacl}} before proceeding to battle Liko and [[Katy]]. In the [[HZ056|next episode]], she battled against Liko and Katy, winning by {{Tera}}stallizing her Clodsire to defeat [[Liko's Floragato]]. In ''[[HZ067|Shine on, Terastallization! Liko vs. Roy!]]'', Rika and Geeta met up with Liko to discuss the results of her training, she then watched Liko's battle against Roy. After the battle, Rika and Geeta congratulated Liko on her growth as a Trainer, and along with Geeta, suggested that Liko consider battling in the {{pal|Pokémon League}} in the future. In ''[[HZ079|Over the Top!]]'', Rika welcomed the [[Rising Volt Tacklers]] along with Penny, the other members of Paldea's Elite Four, and Geeta, after which Rika watched Liko, Roy, and Dot battle Geeta. ====Character==== Rika showed a deep interest in seeking especially strong {{pkmn|Trainer}}s that can hold their own in the [[Paldea League]]. During the meeting with Liko, she cited the high level that Trainers from the [[Kanto]] [[region]] tend to be at and later when she saw Liko in battle, realizing the enormous potential Liko has as a Trainer. Rika is generally lighthearted and kind to others, taking the time before battle to reassure Liko and calm her down, and even joking around with her to try and break the ice. However, she is incredibly ruthless in battle and does not hold back, encouraging others to do the same. As a member of the Paldea Elite Four, Rika is an incredibly skilled and powerful trainer in and of herself, being able to properly and expertly command both her Pokémon at once and improvising strategies and move combinations on the spot. She also does not hesitate to {{Tera}}stallize her Pokémon upon seeing her opponent pull out all the stops, despite having the Tera Type disadvantage. ====Pokémon==== {{TrainerPoké |trainer=Rika |pkmn=Dugtrio |type1=Ground |img=Rika Dugtrio.png |epnum=HZ055 |epname=Showdown! The Paldea Elite Four |vajp= |vaen= |desc={{p|Dugtrio}} is Rika's first known Pokémon. Dugtrio was used alongside {{p|Clodsire}} in her battle against [[Tulip]] and [[Sidian]]. In ''[[HZ056|Liko vs. Rika! Towards the Battle's End]]'', it was {{status|Paralysis|paralyzed}} by a {{m|Bounce}} from [[Katy]]'s {{p|Lokix}}, but won the [[Multi Battle|Tag Battle]] when its partner Clodsire defeated {{TP|Liko|Floragato}}. Dugtrio's known moves are {{m|Dig}} and {{m|Rock Slide}}.}} {{TrainerPoké |trainer=Rika |pkmn=Clodsire |tera=Ground |type1=Poison |type2=Ground |img=Rika Clodsire.png |cap=Rika's Clodsire |img2=Rika Clodsire Terastal.png |cap2=Rika's Terastallized Clodsire |epnum=HZ055 |epname=Showdown! The Paldea Elite Four |vajp=Taku Yashiro |vaen=Daman Mills |desc={{p|Clodsire}} is Rika's second known Pokémon and her main partner. It is capable of {{Tera}}stallizing into a pure {{t|Ground}} [[type]]. Clodsire was used alongside {{p|Dugtrio}} in her battle against [[Tulip]] and [[Sidian]]. In ''[[HZ056|Liko vs. Rika! Towards the Battle's End]]'', it battled [[Liko's Floragato]] and Katy's Lokix. Clodsire knocked Lokix out after poisoning it, then won against Floragato after Terastallizing despite the Tera Type disadvantage, making Rika the winner of the battle. It reappeared during a flashback in ''[[HZ063|Ice Battle! Cold-Eyed Grusha]]''. Clodsire's known moves are {{m|Sludge Wave}}, {{m|Mud Shot}}, {{m|Poison Jab}}, and {{m|Earth Power}}.}} ====Voice actors==== {{vatable|color={{ground color}}|bordercolor={{ground color dark}} |ja=斎賀みつき ''[[Mitsuki Saiga]]'' |en=Erika Ishii |ar=فانيسا البطي ''Vanessa Albouti'' |zh_yue=鄭家蕙 ''Cheng Ka Wai'' |nl=Ina Seidou |fi=Antonia Atarah |fr_eu=Héléna Coppejans |de=Constanze Buttmann |he=נעמה כתבי ''Naama Katabi'' |it=Camilla Marcucci |no=Nora Gjestvang |pl=Katarzyna Anzorge |pt_br=Amanda Brigido |pt_eu=Teresa Arcanjo |es_la=Carla Cerda |es_eu=Alicia Valadés |tr=Selen Öztürk }} ====Artwork==== {| style="margin:auto; text-align:center; {{roundy|20px}} border: 2px solid #{{ground color dark}}; background: #{{ground color}}; font-size:80%;" |- |style="{{roundy|20px}} border: 2px solid #{{ground color dark}}; background: #{{ground color light}};"| [[File:Rika HZ.png|100px]] |style="{{roundy|20px}} border: 2px solid #{{ground color dark}}; background: #{{ground color light}};"| [[File:Rika Anime Expression Sheet.png|250px]] |- style="color:#fff;" |Official artwork of Rika from
